
一、功能句型包
表格 1：观点表达

层级	
英文句型	
中文说明	
高分说明	

基础句	
I prefer Poster 1.	
用途：直接表明选择；语气：简洁明了	
—	

进阶句	
I’m leaning towards Poster 1, as its design stands out.	
用途：委婉表达偏好并补充理由；语气：友好自然	
—	

高级句	
Among the two, Poster 1 strikes me as more compelling due to its emotional resonance.	
用途：对比后强调选择并暗示理由；语气：有层次感	
1. 用“strikes me as”替代“think”更显地道；2. “emotional resonance”为后续理由铺垫	

本题：本题需明确表达选择，适合用此功能句型；避免用“I suggest that”等过于正式或模糊的表达，直接陈述观点更符合朋友间邮件的友好语气。

改一句
I think Poster 1 is good. ❌

→ Personally, I’m leaning towards Poster 1, as its design really catches my eye. ✅

表格 2：论据支撑

层级	
英文句型	
中文说明	
高分说明	

基础句	
Poster 1 is good because it has a cracked heart.	
用途：用具体元素支撑观点；语气：直接	
—	

进阶句	
Poster 1 resonates with me because the cracked yet smiling heart perfectly conveys the message of acceptance.	
用途：结合元素与主题，逻辑更紧密；语气：有深度	
—	

高级句	
The visual metaphor of a cracked heart being held gently speaks volumes about the importance of support during tough times.	
用途：用隐喻深化论据；语气：有文采	
1. “visual metaphor”体现设计分析能力；2. “speaks volumes”增强说服力	

本题：本题需结合海报设计元素（如裂痕、微笑、文字）说明理由，适合用此功能句型；避免空泛说“it’s meaningful”，要紧扣设计细节。

改一句
The poster is good because it has a heart. ❌

→ Poster 1 resonates with me because the cracked yet smiling heart perfectly conveys the message that it’s normal to struggle but still find hope. ✅

表格 3：逻辑衔接

层级	
英文句型	
中文说明	
高分说明	

基础句	
First, Poster 1 has a heart. Second, the text is good.	
用途：分点罗列理由；语气：简单	
—	

进阶句	
Firstly, the visual of hands holding a cracked heart is powerful; secondly, the slogan directly addresses the core theme.	
用途：用逻辑词连接，理由更清晰；语气：连贯	
—	

高级句	
On one hand, the imagery of a cracked heart being supported highlights emotional vulnerability; on the other hand, the slogan normalizes struggles, making the message more relatable.	
用途：用“on one hand... on the other hand”对比分析，逻辑更严密；语气：有层次	
1. “highlights”和“normalizes”体现对设计的深度理解；2. “relatable”呼应心理健康主题	

本题：本题需连接选择与理由，避免流水账，适合用此功能句型；用逻辑衔接词让段落更连贯，符合“说明理由”的要求。

改一句
I like Poster 1. It has a heart. The text is good. ❌

→ Firstly, the visual of hands holding a cracked heart is powerful; secondly, the slogan “It’s okay not to be okay” directly addresses the core theme of mental health acceptance. ✅

二、话题词汇锦囊
语义场 1：观点表达
必备级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

prefer	
更喜欢	
I prefer Poster 1 because its design is more striking.	

think... is better	
认为…更好	
I think Poster 1 is better than Poster 2.	

have a preference for	
对…有偏好	
I have a preference for Poster 1 due to its emotional impact.	

进阶级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

lean towards	
倾向于	
I’m leaning towards Poster 1, as its message is more direct.	

find... more compelling	
觉得…更有说服力	
I find Poster 1 more compelling because of its symbolic imagery.	

be inclined to choose	
倾向于选择	
I’m inclined to choose Poster 1, as it resonates with me more.	

亮点级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

strike me as more impactful	
给我留下更深刻的印象	
Poster 1 strikes me as more impactful due to its raw honesty.	

be drawn to	
被…吸引	
I’m drawn to Poster 1 because the cracked heart feels authentic.	

favor... over...	
更喜欢…而不是…	
I favor Poster 1 over Poster 2, as its design tells a more relatable story.	

语义场 2：设计元素描述
必备级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

cracked heart	
带裂痕的心	
The cracked heart in Poster 1 symbolizes emotional pain.	

watering can	
浇水壶	
The watering can in Poster 2 represents self-care.	

heart-shaped leaves	
心形叶子	
The heart-shaped leaves in Poster 2 connect to the theme of growth.	

进阶级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

visual of hands holding	
双手托着的画面	
The visual of hands holding a cracked heart conveys support.	

smiling heart	
微笑的心	
The smiling heart in Poster 1 adds a note of hope.	

metaphorical imagery	
隐喻性意象	
The metaphorical imagery of Poster 1 makes the message more memorable.	

亮点级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

symbolic representation	
象征性表达	
The cracked heart is a powerful symbolic representation of vulnerability.	

visual metaphor	
视觉隐喻	
The visual metaphor of a heart being “watered” in Poster 2 suggests nurturing one’s mental health.	

raw honesty	
真实的坦诚	
The raw honesty of the cracked heart in Poster 1 makes the message feel genuine.	

语义场 3：心理健康主题关联
必备级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

mental health	
心理健康	
The poster’s theme is mental health, which is important for students.	

acceptance	
接受	
The slogan “It’s okay not to be okay” promotes self-acceptance.	

self-care	
自我关怀	
Poster 2’s “Water your heart” encourages self-care.	

进阶级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

emotional vulnerability	
情绪脆弱	
The cracked heart reflects emotional vulnerability, which is a key part of mental health.	

normalizing struggles	
正常化挣扎	
The slogan normalizes struggles, making people feel less alone.	

fostering resilience	
培养韧性	
Poster 1’s message of acceptance helps foster resilience.	

亮点级

英文词块	
中文释义	
具体使用例句	

emotional resonance	
情感共鸣	
Poster 1 creates strong emotional resonance by acknowledging pain.	

relatable message	
易产生共鸣的信息	
The relatable message of Poster 1 makes it more effective for the target audience.	

nurturing mental well-being	
培养心理健康	
Poster 2’s “Water your heart” idea is about nurturing one’s mental well-being.
